parameters.subject: ✅ Your Discovery Call is Confirmed!
parameters.message:
=

✅ Your Discovery Call is Confirmed!

Hi {{ $json.fields.Name }},

Perfect! I've added our discovery call to both our calendars:

📅 Date: {{ $json.fields["Scheduled call date"] }}

🕐 Time: {{ $json.fields["Scheduled call time"] }} EST (30 minutes)

📞 Join via: Click to Join Meeting

📋 Before Our Call

Please complete this brief intake form (takes 5 minutes):

Complete Intake Form →

This helps me understand your situation and make our time together as valuable as possible.

📚 Resources for You

  • Calendar invitation - check your inbox
  • "Preparing for Your Discovery Call" guide - Download PDF
  • My coaching approach overview - Learn More

💡 What to Expect

During our 30-minute call, we'll:

  • Discuss your current leadership challenges
  • Explore your goals and aspirations
  • Determine if coaching is the right fit
  • Answer any questions you have about working together

Looking forward to our conversation!

NiffyJade

Leadership Coach

📧 adefisayooluwanifemi28@gmail.com

Need to reschedule? Reply to this email.

Scheduled via automated confirmation system
